info.description: Lifetime Brands, Inc. provides kitchenware and tableware products. It operates through the following segments: U.S. and International. The U.S. segment includes the domestic operations of the Company's business that design, market and distribute its products to retailers, distributors and directly to consumers through retail websites. The International segment includes business operations conducted outside the United States. The company was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Garden City, NY.
info.description_zh: Lifetime Brands, Inc. 提供廚具和餐具產品。它透過以下部門運作：美國部門和國際部門。美國部門包括該公司的國內業務，即向零售商、分銷​​商以及透過零售網站直接向消費者設計、行銷和分銷其產品。國際部門包括在美國境外開展的業務運作。該公司成立於 1945 年，總部位於紐約州花園城。

info.description: F/m Emerald Life Sciences Innovation ETF seeks long-term capital appreciation. The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund ("ETF") and invests primarily in equity securities of life science companies selected by Emerald Mutual Fund Advisers Trust, the fund's investment sub-adviser, under the supervision of the adviser. Under normal market conditions, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in equity securities issued by life science companies demonstrating innovation.
info.description_zh: F/m Emerald Life Sciences Innovation ETF 尋求長期資本增值。該基金為一檔主動式管理型交易所交易基金（「ETF」），主要投資於該基金的投資副顧問 Emerald Mutual Fund Advisers Trust 選擇的生命科學公司的股本證券，並接受顧問的監督。在正常市場條件下，該基金至少80%的淨資產投資於具有創新能力的生命科學公司發行的股本證券。

info.description: Liminatus Pharma, Inc. is a pre-clinical-stage immuno-oncology company, which engages in developing novel, immune-modulating cancer therapies. The company was founded on November 1, 2020 and is headquartered in Cerritos, CA.
info.description_zh: Liminatus Pharma, Inc.是一家臨床前階段免疫腫瘤學公司，致力於開發新型免疫調節癌症療法。該公司成立於2020年11月1日，總部位於加州塞里托斯。

info.description: Pulmonx Corp. is a medical technology company, which engages in the provision of interventional pulmonology, planning tools and treatments for obstructive lung diseases. It operates through the United States, Europe, Middle East, Africa, Asia Pacific, and Other International segments. The company was founded by Rodney Perkins on December 26, 1995 and is headquartered in Redwood City, CA.
info.description_zh: Pulmonx Corp. 是一家醫療科技公司，致力於為阻塞性肺病提供介入性肺病學、規劃工具和治療。它透過美國、歐洲、中東、非洲、亞太地區和其他國際部門開展業務。該公司由 Rodney Perkins 於 1995 年 12 月 26 日創立，總部位於加州雷德伍德市。

info.description: Lixiang Education Holding Co., Ltd. operates as an investment holding company, which engages in the provision of education services. It offers kindergarten, private primary, and secondary levels. The company was founded by Fen Ye in August 2001 and is headquartered in Lishui, China.
info.description_zh: 理想教育控股有限公司是一家投資控股公司，主要提供教育服務。它提供幼兒園、私立小學和中學。該公司由葉芬於2001年8月創立，總部位於中國麗水。

info.description: Momentus, Inc. engages in the provision of in-space infrastructure services. It offers space transportation and in-orbit servicing. The company was founded by Mikhail Kokorich in 2017 and is headquartered in Santa Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Momentus, Inc. 從事提供太空基礎設施服務。它提供太空運輸和在軌服務。該公司由 Mikhail Kokorich 於 2017 年創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: State Street My2030 High Yield Corporate Bond ETF is an actively managed fund that employs a target maturity strategy, primarily investing in high-yield corporate bonds scheduled to mature in 2030. The fund utilizes a bottom-up security selection process to overweight attractive sectors and issuers while seeking to maximize current income and preserve capital as it approaches its planned liquidation date on or about December 15, 2030.
info.description_zh: State Street My2030 高收益公司債 ETF 是一檔積極管理的基金，採用目標到期日策略，主要投資於計劃於 2030 年到期的高收益公司債。該基金利用自下而上的證券選擇流程來增持有吸引力的行業和發行人，同時在接近 2030 年 12 月 15 日左右的計劃清算日期時尋求最大化當前收入並保留資本。

info.description: NMP Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on December 18, 2024 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: NMP Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，從事與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2024年12月18日，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: PicoCELA, Inc. engages in the manufacturing, installation, and services for enterprise wireless mesh solutions. It also offers wireless multi-hop relay devices. The company was founded by Hiroshi Furukawa on August 8, 2008 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
info.description_zh: PicoCELA, Inc. 從事企業無線網狀網路解決方案的製造、安裝和服務。它還提供無線多跳中繼設備。該公司由Hiroshi Furukawa於2008年8月8日創立，總部位於日本東京。

info.description: VanEck Pharmaceutical ETF seeks to replicate as closely as possible, before fees and expenses, the price and yield performance of the MVIS US Listed Pharmaceutical 25 Index. The fund normally invests at least 80% of its total assets in securities that comprise the fund's benchmark index. The index includes common stocks and depositary receipts of U.S. exchange-listed companies in the pharmaceutical industry. Such companies may include medium-capitalization companies and foreign companies that are listed on a U.S. exchange. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: VanEck Pharmaceutical ETF 尋求盡可能接近複製 MVIS 美國上市製藥 25 指數的價格和收益率表現（未計費用和支出）。該基金通常將其總資產的至少 80% 投資於構成該基金基準指數的證券。該指數包括美國交易所上市的製藥業公司的普通股和存託憑證。此類公司可能包括中等資本公司和在美國交易所上市的外國公司。它是非多元化的。

info.description: Invesco QQQ Low Volatility ETF seeks to track the investment results (before fees and expenses) of the Nasdaq-100 Low VolatilityTM Index. The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its total assets in the securities that comprise the underlying index. The underlying index is designed to track the performance of a subset of stocks within the Nasdaq-100 Index (the "Parent Index") that have exhibited the least volatility over the past 12 months, as determined by the index provider. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Invesco QQQ Low Volatility ETF 旨在追蹤 Nasdaq-100 Low VolatilityTM 指數的投資結果（扣除費用和開支之前）。該基金通常將至少 90% 的總資產投資於構成標的指數的證券。基礎指數旨在追蹤納斯達克 100 指數（「母指數」）內部分股票的表現，這些股票在過去 12 個月內波動性最小（由指數提供者確定）。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Steven Madden Ltd. engages in the design, marketing, and sale of fashion-forward footwear for women, men, and children. It operates through the following segments: Wholesale Footwear, Wholesale Accessories and Apparel, Direct-to-Consumer, First Cost, and Licensing. The Wholesale Footwear segment includes branded and private label women's, men's, girl's and children's footwear. The Wholesale Accessories and Apparel segment consists of branded and private label handbags, belts and small leather goods, and cold weather and selected other fashion accessories. The Direct-to-Consumer segment distributes branded footwear, apparel and accessories directly to the consumer. The First Cost segment earns commissions and design fees for serving as a buying agent of footwear products to mass-market merchandisers, mid-tier department stores, and other retailers. The Licensing segment licenses its trademarks for use in connection with the manufacture, marketing, and sale of outerwear, hosiery, active wear, sleepwear, jewelry, watches, hair accessories, umbrellas, bedding, luggage, and men's leather accessories. The company was founded by Steven L. Madden on July 9, 1990 and is headquartered in Long Island City, NY.
info.description_zh: Steven Madden Ltd. 從事時尚前衛女鞋、男鞋和兒童鞋類的設計、行銷和銷售。該公司透過以下部門運作：鞋類批發部門、配件和服裝批發部門、直接面向消費者部門、首次成本部門和許可部門。批發鞋類部門包括品牌和自有品牌女鞋、男鞋、女童鞋和兒童鞋。批發配件和服裝部門包括品牌和自有品牌手袋、皮帶和小皮具，以及寒冷天氣和精選的其他時尚配件。直接面向消費者部門直接向消費者分銷品牌鞋類、服裝和配件。 First Cost 部門以大眾市場商家、中型百貨公司和其他零售商的鞋類產品採購代理賺取佣金和設計費用。許可部門許可其商標用於外套、襪子、運動服、睡衣、珠寶、手錶、髮飾、雨傘、床上用品、行李箱和男士皮革配件的製造、行銷和銷售。該公司由 Steven L. Madden 於 1990 年 7 月 9 日創立，總部位於紐約長島市。

info.description: Solarius Capital Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. The company was founded on April 1, 2025 and is headquartered in Darien, CT.
info.description_zh: Solarius Capital Acquisition Corp. 以空白支票公司營運。該公司成立於2025年4月1日，總部位於康乃狄克州達里恩。

info.description: Strategy, Inc. is a Bitcoin Treasury company. The firm has adopted Bitcoin as a primary treasury reserve asset. It uses proceeds from equity and debt financing, as well as cash flows from operations, to strategically accumulate Bitcoin and advocate for its role as digital capital. Its treasury strategy is designed to provide investors varying degrees of economic exposure to Bitcoin by offering a range of securities, including equity and fixed-income instruments. It provides industry AI-powered enterprise analytics software. The company was founded by Michael J. Saylor and Sanjeev K. Bansal on November 17, 1989, and is headquartered in Tysons Corner, VA.
info.description_zh: Strategy, Inc. 是一家比特幣財務公司。該公司已採用比特幣作為主要的國庫儲備資產。它利用股權和債務融資的收益以及營運現金流來策略性地累積比特幣並宣傳其作為數位資本的角色。其財務策略旨在透過提供一系列證券（包括股票和固定收益工具），為投資者提供不同程度的比特幣經濟風險。它提供由產業人工智慧驅動的企業分析軟體。該公司由 Michael J. Saylor 和 Sanjeev K. Bansal 於 1989 年 11 月 17 日創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州泰森斯角。

info.description: Xsolla SPAC 1 is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The was founded on September 16, 2025 and is headquartered in Sherman Oaks, CA.
info.description_zh: Xsolla SPAC 1 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業實現合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於 2025 年 9 月 16 日，總部位於加州謝爾曼奧克斯。

info.description: State Street My2028 High Yield Corporate Bond ETF is an actively managed fund that employs a target maturity strategy, primarily investing in high-yield corporate bonds scheduled to mature in 2028. The fund utilizes a bottom-up security selection process to overweight attractive sectors and issuers while seeking to maximize current income and preserve capital as it approaches its planned liquidation date on or about December 15, 2028.
info.description_zh: State Street My2028 高收益公司債 ETF 是一檔積極管理的基金，採用目標到期日策略，主要投資於計劃於 2028 年到期的高收益公司債。該基金利用自下而上的證券選擇流程來增持有吸引力的行業和發行人，同時尋求在接近 2028 年 12 月 15 日左右的計劃清算日期時實現當前收入最大化並保留資本。

info.description: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or other similar business combination, involving one or more businesses or assets. The company was founded on July 11, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是實現涉及一項或多項業務或資產的合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或其他類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年7月11日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: First Trust Nasdaq Lux Digital Health Solutions ETF seeks results that correspond generally to the price and yield of an equity index called the Nasdaq Lux Health Tech Index TM (the "index"). The fund will normally invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the common stocks and depositary receipts that comprise the index. The index is designed to measure the performance of a selection of companies that are primarily engaged in and involved at the intersection of healthcare and technology, as classified by Lux Capital based on analysis of the products and services offered by those companies. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: First Trust Nasdaq Lux Digital Health Solutions ETF 尋求與名為 Nasdaq Lux Health Tech Index TM（「指數」）的股票指數的價格和收益率大致相對應的結果。該基金通常將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於構成該指數的普通股和存託憑證。該指數旨在衡量主要從事醫療保健和技術交叉領域的精選公司的業績，Lux Capital 根據對這些公司提供的產品和服務的分析進行分類。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Social Commerce Partners Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on August 11, 2025 and is headquartered in Plano, TX.
info.description_zh: Social Commerce Partners Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2025年8月11日，總部位於德克薩斯州普萊諾。

info.description: Kinder Morgan, Inc. engages in providing pipeline transportation of natural gas services. It operates through the following business segments: Natural Gas Pipelines, Products Pipelines, Terminals, and CO2. The Natural Gas Pipelines segment operates major interstate and intrastate natural gas pipelines and storage systems. The Products Pipelines segment is involved in the operation of refined petroleum products, crude oil, and condensate pipelines. The Terminals segment includes the operation of liquids and bulk terminal facilities that store and handle various commodities. The CO2 segment produces, transports, and markets to oil fields that use CO2 as a flooding medium to increase recovery and production of crude oil from mature oil fields. The company was founded by Richard D. Kinder and William V. Morgan in February 1997 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Kinder Morgan, Inc. 從事提供天然氣管道運輸服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：天然氣管道、產品管道、碼頭和二氧化碳。天然氣管道部門運作主要的州際和州內天然氣管道和儲存系統。產品管道部門從事成品油、原油和凝析油管道的營運。碼頭部門包括經營儲存和處理各種商品的液體和散裝碼頭設施。二氧化碳部門生產、運輸並向使用二氧化碳作為驅油介質的油田銷售，以提高成熟油田原油的採收率和產量。該公司由 Richard D. Kinder 和 William V. Morgan 於 1997 年 2 月創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Pacer BlueStar Digital Entertainment ETF seeks to track the total return performance of the BlueStar Global Online Gambling, Video Gaming, and eSports Index (the "Index"). The fund employs a "passive management" investment approach designed to track the total return performance of the index. The index is a rules-based index that consists of globally-listed stocks and depositary receipts of digital entertainment companies. Under normal circumstances, at least 80% of the fund's net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) will be invested in companies that derive at least 50% of their revenues from Digital Entertainment. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Pacer BlueStar Digital Entertainment ETF 旨在追蹤 BlueStar 全球線上賭博、電玩和電競指數（「指數」）的總回報表現。該基金採用「被動管理」投資方式，旨在追蹤指數的總回報表現。該指數是一個基於規則的指數，由全球上市股票和數位娛樂公司的存託憑證組成。在正常情況下，至少 80% 的基金淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）將投資於至少 50% 收入來自數位娛樂的公司。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: D. Boral Arc Acquisition I Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on March 20, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: D. Boral Arc Acquisition I Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。 The company was founded on March 20, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.

info.description: Solana Co. is a neurotech company in the medical device industry that focuses on neurological wellness. The firm develops, licenses and acquires non-invasive platform technologies that amplify the brain's ability to heal itself and reduce symptoms of neurological disease or trauma. It engages in the development of the investigational portable neuromodulation stimulator, that delivers neurostimulation via the tongue which has been shown in clinical studies to enhance the effectiveness of physical exercises in people with neurological symptoms from disease or trauma such as mild-to-moderate traumatic brain injury. The company was founded on March 13, 2014 and is headquartered in Newtown, PA.
info.description_zh: Solana Co. 是一家醫療器材產業的神經科技公司，專注於神經健康。該公司開發、授權和收購非侵入性平台技術，這些技術可以增強大腦的自我修復能力並減少神經系統疾病或創傷的症狀。該公司致力於開發正在研究的便攜式神經調節刺激器，該刺激器透過舌頭提供神經刺激，臨床研究表明，這種刺激器可以提高因疾病或創傷（例如輕度至中度創傷性腦損傷）而出現神經系統症狀的人的體育鍛煉的有效性。該公司成立於2014年3月13日，總部位於賓州紐敦。

info.description: Black Diamond Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage oncology company developing MasterKey therapies that target families of oncogenic mutations in patients with cancer. The company's MasterKey therapies are designed to address a broad spectrum of genetically defined tumors, overcome resistance, minimize wild-type-mediated toxicities, and be brain-penetrant to treat central nervous system diseases. It is currently focused on advancing a Phase 2 NSCLC trial of BDTX-1535, a brain-penetrant, fourth-generation epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) MasterKey inhibitor targeting EGFR-mutant NSCLC and glioblastoma. The company was founded by David M. Epstein and Elizabeth Buck in 2014 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: Black Diamond Therapeutics, Inc. 是一家臨床階段的腫瘤學公司，開發針對癌症患者致癌突變家族的 MasterKey 療法。該公司的 MasterKey 療法旨在解決廣泛的基因定義的腫瘤，克服抗藥性，最大限度地減少野生型介導的毒性，並具有腦滲透性以治療中樞神經系統疾病。該公司目前專注於推進 BDTX-1535 的 2 期 NSCLC 試驗，BDTX-1535 是一種針對 EGFR 突變 NSCLC 和膠質母細胞瘤的腦滲透性第四代表皮生長因子受體 (EGFR) MasterKey 抑制劑。該公司由 David M. Epstein 和 Elizabeth Buck 於 2014 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: Septerna, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company, which engages in pioneering a new era of G protein-coupled receptor oral small molecule drug discovery powered by proprietary Native Complex PlatformTM. Its pipeline of product candidates focused initially on treating patients in three therapeutic areas: endocrinology, immunology and inflammation, and metabolic diseases. The company was founded by Robert Joseph Lefkowitz, Arthur Christopoulos, Patrick Sexton, and Jeffrey T. Finer in December 2019 and is headquartered in South San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Septerna, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物技術公司，致力於開創由專有的 Native Complex PlatformTM 提供支持的 G 蛋白偶聯受體口服小分子藥物發現的新時代。其候選產品系列最初著重於治療三個治療領域的患者：內分泌學、免疫學和發炎以及代謝疾病。該公司由 Robert Joseph Lefkowitz、Arthur Christopoulos、Patrick Sexton 和 Jeffrey T. Finer 於 2019 年 12 月創立，總部位於加州南舊金山。

info.description: GP-Act III Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company, which was created for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on November 23, 2020 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: GP-Act III Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運營，其創建目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2020年11月23日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: TDH Holdings, Inc. is a real estate management company, that focuses on owning, operating and managing commercial real estate properties. It provides office services for small and medium-sized enterprises. The company was founded by Rong Feng Cui on April 22, 2002 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: TDH Holdings, Inc. 是一家房地產管理公司，專注於擁有、經營和管理商業房地產。為中小企業提供辦公服務。該公司由崔榮峰於2002年4月22日創立，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Militia Long/Short Equity ETF seeks capital appreciation. The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund ("ETF") that seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing in both long and short positions in equity securities or ETFs that Militia Investments, LLC, the sub-adviser to the fund (the "Sub-Adviser"), believes offer the potential for capital appreciation. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Militia 多頭/空頭股票 ETF 尋求資本增值。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金（「ETF」），旨在透過投資股票證券或 ETF 的多頭和空頭部位來實現其投資目標，該基金的副顧問（「副顧問」）Militia Investments, LLC 認為這些證券或 ETF 具有資本增值的潛力。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Laureate Education, Inc. engages in the provision of higher educational services to undergraduate and graduate degree programs. It operates through the Mexico and Peru segments. The Mexico and Peru segments include the operation and management of universities. The company was founded by Douglas L. Becker in 1989 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: Laureate Education, Inc. 致力於為本科和研究生學位課程提供高等教育服務。它透過墨西哥和秘魯部門運作。墨西哥和秘魯部分包括大學的運作和管理。該公司由 Douglas L. Becker 於 1989 年創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: Stoneport Advisors Commodity Long Short ETF seeks to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the Stoneport Advisors Dynamic Commodity Index - Total Return. The fund invests both long and short, in highly liquid U.S. exchange-listed physical commodity futures contracts that are contained in the index or that have characteristics that the Adviser believes make their return performance likely to be highly correlated to futures contracts that are contained in the index. The index is a rules-based, quantitative, long-short commodity futures index comprised of liquid, U.S. exchange-listed physical commodity futures contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Stoneport Advisors 商品多空 ETF 旨在追蹤 Stoneport Advisors 動態商品指數 - 總回報（未計費用和開支）的表現。該基金對流動性高的美國交易所上市實體商品期貨合約進行多頭和空頭投資，這些期貨合約包含在指數中，或具有顧問認為其回報表現可能與指數中包含的期貨合約高度相關的特徵。該指數是一種基於規則的定量多空商品期貨指數，由流動性強、在美國交易所上市的實體商品期貨合約組成。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Journey Medical Corp. is a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company, which focuses on the development and commercialization of pharmaceutical products for the treatment of dermatological conditions. Its brands include QBREXZA, Accutane, Targadox, AMZEEQ, Ximino, ZILXI, Exelderm, and Luxamend. The company was founded by Claude Maraoui in October 2014 and is headquartered in Scottsdale, AZ.
info.industry_zh: 藥品製造商 - 特用藥品和非專利藥品
info.description_zh: Journey Medical Corp. 是一家商業階段的製藥公司，專注於治療皮膚病的藥品的開發和商業化。其品牌包括 QBREXZA、Accutane、Targadox、AMZEEQ、Ximino、ZILXI、Exelderm 和 Luxamend。該公司由 Claude Maraoui 於 2014 年 10 月創立，總部位於亞利桑那州斯科茨代爾。

info.description: Firefly Aerospace, Inc. engages in the design and manufacture of space launch vehicles. It offers Alpha, Beta, Gamma, and orbital transfer vehicles. The company was founded by Thomas E. Markusic, Mark Watt, and Max Polyakov in January 27, 2017 and is headquartered in Cedar Park, TX.
info.description_zh: Firefly Aerospace, Inc. 從事航太運載火箭的設計與製造。它提供 Alpha、Beta、Gamma 和軌道運輸工具。該公司由 Thomas E. Markusic、Mark Watt 和 Max Polyakov 於 2017 年 1 月 27 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州錫達帕克。

info.description: First Trust Nasdaq Oil & Gas ETF seeks investment results that correspond generally to the price and yield (before the fund's fees and expenses) of the Nasdaq US Smart Oil & Gas IndexTM. The fund will normally invest at least 90% of its net assets (including investment borrowings) in the common stocks and depository receipts that comprise the index. The index is designed to provide exposure to U.S. companies comprising the oil and gas sector that have been selected based upon their liquidity and weighted based upon their cumulative score on three investing factors: volatility, value and growth. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: First Trust 納斯達克石油和天然氣 ETF 尋求與納斯達克美國智慧石油和天然氣指數™ 的價格和收益率（未計基金費用和開支）相對應的投資結果。該基金通常將至少 90% 的淨資產（包括投資借款）投資於構成該指數的普通股和存託憑證。該指數旨在提供對包括石油和天然氣行業在內的美國公司的投資，這些公司是根據其流動性進行選擇的，並根據其在三個投資因素（波動性、價值和增長）的累積得分進行加權。它是非多元化的。

info.description: Xilio Therapeutics, Inc. operates as a biotechnology company. It focuses on harnessing the immune system to achieve deep and durable clinical responses in cancer. The company uses its proprietary geographically precise solutions platform to rapidly engineer novel molecules, including cytokines and other biologics. Xilio Therapeutics was founded by John C. Williams and Ulrich Rodeck in June 2015 and is headquartered in Waltham, MA.
info.description_zh: Xilio Therapeutics, Inc. 是一家生物技術公司。它的重點是利用免疫系統來實現深度和持久的癌症臨床反應。該公司利用其專有的地理精確解決方案平台來快速設計新型分子，包括細胞激素和其他生物製劑。 Xilio Therapeutics 由 John C. Williams 和 Ulrich Rodeck 於 2015 年 6 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州沃爾瑟姆。

info.description: Precision Optics Corp. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and selling of optical instruments. Its products include microprecision lenses and micro medical cameras, 3D endoscopes, and robotic surgery systems. The company was founded by Richard E. Forkey in December 1982 and is headquartered in Gardner, MA.
info.description_zh: Precision Optics Corp. 從事光學儀器的設計、開發、製造和銷售。其產品包括微精密鏡頭和微型醫療相機、3D內視鏡和機器人手術系統。該公司由 Richard E. Forkey 於 1982 年 12 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州加德納。

info.description: Invesco DWA Energy Momentum ETF seeks to track the investment results (before fees and expenses) of the Dorsey Wright Energy Technical Leaders Index (the "underlying index"). The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its total assets in the securities that comprise the underlying index. The underlying index is composed of at least 30 securities of companies in the energy sector that have powerful relative strength or "momentum" characteristics.
info.description_zh: Invesco DWA Energy Momentum ETF 旨在追蹤 Dorsey Wright Energy Technical Leaders Index（「基礎指數」）的投資結果（扣除費用和開支之前）。該基金通常將至少 90% 的總資產投資於構成標的指數的證券。基礎指數由至少 30 家能源產業公司的證券組成，這些公司具有強大的相對實力或「動量」特徵。

info.description: MindWalk Holdings Corp. is an AI-driven biotherapeutic research, technology, and scientifically robust life science company that discovers and develops customized and novel antibodies by generating proprietary and patented processes, procedures, and innovative approaches to antibody discovery, development, and production. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States of America, Europe, Canada, Australia, and Other. The company was founded by Robert Beecroft on November 22, 1983 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: MindWalk Holdings Corp. 是一家由人工智慧驅動的生物治療研究、技術和科學穩健的生命科學公司，透過產生抗體發現、開發和生產的專有和專利流程、程序和創新方法來發現和開發定制的新型抗體。它透過以下地理區域運作：美國、歐洲、加拿大、澳洲和其他地區。該公司由 Robert Beecroft 於 1983 年 11 月 22 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: CME Group, Inc. operates a derivatives marketplace, which offers a range of futures and options products for risk management. Its exchanges offer a range of global benchmark products across all major asset classes based on interest rates, equity indexes, foreign exchange (FX), energy, agricultural commodities and metals. It offers futures and options on futures trading across asset classes through the CME Globex platform, fixed income trading via BrokerTec and FX trading on the EBS platform. In addition, it also operates CME Clearing, a central counterparty clearing provider. The company was founded in 1898 and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: CME Group, Inc. 經營一個衍生性商品市場，提供一系列用於風險管理的期貨和選擇權產品。其交易所提供一系列基於利率、股票指數、外匯（FX）、能源、農產品和金屬的全球基準產品，涵蓋所有主要資產類別。它透過 CME Globex 平台提供跨資產類別的期貨和期貨選擇權交易，透過 BrokerTec 提供固定收益交易，並在 EBS 平台上提供外匯交易。此外，它還營運中央對手方清算提供者CME Clearing。該公司成立於 1898 年，總部位於伊利諾州芝加哥。

info.description: Direxion Daily XOM Bull 2X Shares seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the daily performance of XOM. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the securities of XOM and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that, in combination, provide 2X daily leveraged exposure to XOM, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Direxion Daily XOM Bull 2X Shares 尋求 XOM 每日表現的 200%（未計費用和開支）的每日投資結果。在正常情况下，该基金将至少 80% 的净资产（加上任何用于投资目的的借款）投资于 XOM 证券以及掉期协议和期权等金融工具，这些金融工具结合起来为 XOM 提供 2 倍的每日杠杆敞口，这与基金的投资目标一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Immunovant, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which focuses on enabling normal lives for patients with autoimmune diseases. It is developing a novel, fully human monoclonal antibody IMVT-1401 that selectively binds to and inhibits the neonatal fragment crystallizable receptor. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Durham, NC.
info.description_zh: Immunovant, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，專注於幫助自體免疫疾病患者恢復正常生活。該公司正在開發一種新型全人源單株抗體 IMVT-1401，可選擇性結合並抑制新生兒片段可結晶受體。該公司成立於 2018 年，總部位於北卡羅來納州達勒姆。

info.description: Gemini Space Station, Inc. is a holding company, which offers a mobile and web based crypto asset exchange platform, proprietary wallet infrastructure and custody solutions, over-the-counter trading solutions tailored to institutions and professionals, a digital art auction platform, a proprietary United States dollar backed stablecoin, and a credit card product that offers crypto asset rewards on customer purchases. The company was founded by Tyler Winklevoss and Cameron Winklevoss in 2014 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Gemini Space Station, Inc. 是一家控股公司，提供基於行動和網路的加密資產交易平台、專有的錢包基礎設施和託管解決方案、為機構和專業人士量身定制的場外交易解決方案、數位藝術品拍賣平台、專有的美元支援的穩定幣以及為客戶購買提供加密資產獎勵的信用卡產品。該公司由 Tyler Winklevoss 和 Cameron Winklevoss 於 2014 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: NextDecade Corp. is a development company, which focuses on liquefied natural gas (LNG) export projects and associated pipelines. It develops and manages land-based and floating liquefied natural gas projects in the Gulf Coast with focus on the Rio Grande LNG. The company was founded by Kathleen Eishbrenner in 2010 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣設備與服務
info.description_zh: NextDecade Corp. 是一家開發公司，專注於液化天然氣 (LNG) 出口項目及相關管道。該公司在墨西哥灣沿岸開發和管理陸基和浮式液化天然氣項目，並專注於格蘭德河液化天然氣項目。該公司由 Kathleen Eishbrenner 於 2010 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Bridgford Foods Corp. engages in the manufacture, market, and distribution of frozen and snack food products. It operates through the Frozen Food Products and Snack Food Products segments. The Frozen Food Products segment manufactures and distributes food products, including biscuits, bread dough items, roll dough items, and sandwiches. The Snack Food Products segment distributes both products manufactured by the company and third parties. The company was founded by Hugh H. Bridgford in February 1932 and is headquartered in Dallas, TX.
info.description_zh: Bridgford Foods Corp. 從事冷凍食品和休閒食品的製造、行銷和分銷。它透過冷凍食品和休閒食品部門運作。冷凍食品部門生產和分銷食品，包括餅乾、麵包麵團、麵團捲和三明治。休閒食品部門分銷公司和第三方生產的產品。該公司由 Hugh H. Bridgford 於 1932 年 2 月創立，總部位於德克薩斯州達拉斯。

info.description: Kestrel Group Ltd. engages in provides reinsurance products and services to regional and specialty property and casualty insurers. It operates through the following segments: Legacy Reinsurance, Insurance Programs, and Corporate. The Legacy Reinsurance segment focuses on the results of operations of all businesses of the company and its subsidiaries. The Insurance Programs segment refers to the results of operations of all businesses of Kestrel Group LLC. The Corporate segment relates to the general corporate and management-related expenses of the company and its subsidiaries. The company is headquartered in Hamilton, Bermuda.
info.description_zh: Kestrel Group Ltd. 致力於提供區域和專業財產及意外傷害保險公司再保險產品和服務。它透過以下部門運作：傳統再保險部門、保險計畫部門和企業部門。遺產再保險部門專注於公司及其子公司所有業務的營運績效。保險計劃部門是指 Kestrel Group LLC 所有業務的營運結果。公司部門涉及公司及其子公司的一般公司和管理相關費用。該公司總部位於百慕達漢密爾頓。

info.description: Shengfeng Development Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of contract logistics services. It also focuses on B2B freight transportation, cloud storage, and value-added services. The company was founded by Yong Xu Liu in 2001 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.
info.description_zh: 盛豐發展有限公司是一家控股公司，從事提供合約物流服務。它還專注於B2B貨運、雲端儲存和增值服務。該公司由劉永旭於2001年創立，總部位於中國福州。

info.description: Ispire Technology, Inc. engages in the research and development, design, commercialization, sales, marketing, and distribution of branded e-cigarettes and cannabis vaping products. The company was founded on June 13, 2022 and is headquartered in Los Angeles, CA.
info.description_zh: Ispire Technology, Inc.從事品牌電子煙和大麻電子煙產品的研發、設計、商業化、銷售、行銷和分銷。該公司成立於2022年6月13日，總部位於加州洛杉磯。

info.description: Canary XRP ETF seeks to provide exposure to the value of XRP held by the Trust, less the expenses of the Trust's operations and other liabilities and establish its net asset value ("NAV") by reference to the CoinDesk XRP CCIXber 60m New York Rate. The Trust intends to provide direct exposure to the value of XRP held by the Trust with Gemini Trust Company, LLC (the "Gemini Custodian") and BitGo Trust Company, Inc. The Gemini Custodian is a New York limited purpose trust company regulated by the New York Department of Financial Services that provides custody services for digital assets.
info.description_zh: Canary XRP ETF 旨在提供信託持有的 XRP 價值的曝險，減去信託營運費用和其他負債，並參考 CoinDesk XRP CCIXber 60m 紐約匯率確定其資產淨值（「NAV」）。該信託計劃與 Gemini Trust Company, LLC（「Gemini Custodian」）和 BitGo Trust Company, Inc. 直接接觸該信託持有的 XRP 價值。 Gemini Custodian 是一家受紐約金融服務部監管的紐約有限目的信託公司，為數位資產提供託管服務。

info.description: Innate Pharma SA is a global, clinical-stage biotechnology company, which engages in developing immunotherapies for cancer patients. Its product pipeline includes Lacutamab, Monalizumab, Avdoralimab, and IPH62. The company was founded by Herve Eloi Dominique Brailly, Eric Vivier, Marc Bonneville, Alessandro Moretta, Jean-Jacques Fournie, and Francois Romagne on September 23, 1999 and is headquartered in Marseille, France.
info.description_zh: Innate Pharma SA 是一家全球性臨床階段生物技術公司，致力於為癌症患者開發免疫療法。其產品線包括 Lacutamab、Monalizumab、Avdoralimab 和 IPH62。該公司由 Herve Eloi Dominique Brailly、Eric Vivier、Marc Bonneville、Alessandro Moretta、Jean-Jacques Fournie 和 Francois Romagne 於 1999 年 9 月 23 日創立，總部位於法國馬賽。

info.description: Oriental Rise Holdings Ltd. engages in the cultivation, processing, and sale of tea leaves and tea products. It operates through the Primarily-Processes Teas and Refined Teas segments. The company was founded by Chun Sun Wong, Wai Kwong Fong and Deming Zhou on January 25, 2019 and is headquartered in Ningde, China.
info.description_zh: 東方崛起控股有限公司從事茶葉及茶產品的種植、加工及銷售。它透過初加工茶和精製茶部門運作。該公司由Chun Sun Wong、Wai Kwong Fong和Deming Zhou於2019年1月25日創立，總部位於中國寧德。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long SATS Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of SATS. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of SATS, consistent with the fund's investment objective. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 SATS 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 SATS 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上投資目的借款）投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 200% 的 SATS 價格每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。它是非多元化的。

info.description: LOBO Technologies Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of electric vehicles. The company designs and develops e-bicycles, e-mopeds, e-tricycles, and electric off-highway four-wheeled shuttles. It operates through the Electric Vehicles and Accessories Sales and Software Royalties and Development, and Design Services segments. The Electric Vehicles and Accessories Sales segment engages in the manufacture and sale of electric vehicles and accessories. The Software Royalties and Development, and Design Services segment provides software solutions development for automotive electronics. The company was founded on October 25, 2021 and is headquartered in Wuxi, China.
info.description_zh: LOBO Technologies Ltd.從事電動車的製造和銷售。該公司設計和開發電動自行車、電動輕便摩托車、電動三輪車和電動非公路四班車。它透過電動車及配件銷售、軟體版稅和開發以及設計服務部門運作。電動車及配件銷售分部從事電動車及配件的製造及銷售。軟體版稅和開發以及設計服務部門提供汽車電子軟體解決方案開發。公司成立於2021年10月25日，總部位於中國無錫。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long GEMI Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of GEMI. The fund is an actively managed ETF. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in the Underlying Security and financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of GEMI, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 GEMI 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 GEMI 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是主動式管理ETF。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款）投資於標的證券和具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具結合起來提供 GEMI 價格的 200% 每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Leslie's, Inc. engages in the provision of direct-to-consumer pool and spa care services. It offers equipment installation and repair for residential consumers and professional pool operators. The company was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.description_zh: Leslie's, Inc. 從事提供直接面向消費者的泳池和水療護理服務。它為住宅消費者和專業泳池營運商提供設備安裝和維修服務。該公司成立於 1963 年，總部位於亞利桑那州鳳凰城。

info.description: Primech Holdings Ltd. engages in the provision of commercial cleaning solutions. Its cleaning services caters to conservancy areas, educational institutions, airports, facilities, and exteriors of buildings. The company was founded on December 29, 2020 and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: Primech Holdings Ltd. 從事提供商業清潔解決方案。其清潔服務面向保護區、教育機構、機場、設施和建築物外部。該公司成立於2020年12月29日，總部位於新加坡。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2x Long FIG Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of FIG. The fund is an actively managed ETF. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of FIG, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund manager will attempt to achieve its investment objective without regard to overall market movement or the increase or decrease in the value of FIG. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍長期Fig 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為Fig 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍（200%）。該基金是主動式管理ETF。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 200% 的每日槓桿敞口，符合FIG 的價格，與基金的投資目標一致。基金管理人將嘗試實現其投資目標，而不考慮整體市場走勢或圖值的增加或減少。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: CPS Technologies Corp. engages in the provision of advanced material solutions to the transportation, automotive, energy, computing or Internet, telecommunications, aerospace, defense, and oil and gas end markets. The firm focuses on the design, manufacture, and sale of custom metal matrix composite components. It also assembles housings and packages for hybrid circuit. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Norton, MA.
info.description_zh: CPS Technologies Corp. 致力於為交通、汽車、能源、計算或互聯網、電信、航空航太、國防以及石油和天然氣終端市場提供先進材料解決方案。該公司專注於客製化金屬基複合材料零件的設計、製造和銷售。它還組裝混合電路的外殼和封裝。該公司成立於 1984 年，總部位於馬薩諸塞州諾頓。

info.description: Vestand, Inc. engages in the operation of a Japanese restaurant under the name Yoshiharu Ramen. It offers Japanese ramens, rice bowls, and appetizers. The company was founded by James Chae in 2016 and is headquartered in Buena Park, CA.
info.description_zh: Vestand, Inc. 經營一家名為 Yoshiharu Ramen 的日本餐廳。提供日本拉麵、蓋飯和開胃菜。該公司由 James Chae 於 2016 年創立，總部位於加州布埃納帕克。

info.description: TOP Financial Group Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in providing financial market and securities services. It focuses on futures brokerage and other financial services through a trading platform. The company was founded by Jun Li Yang on August 1, 2019 and is headquartered in Hong Kong.
info.description_zh: TOP Financial Group Ltd.是一家控股公司，從事提供金融市場和證券服務。它專注於透過交易平台提供期貨經紀和其他金融服務。該公司由楊麗君於2019年8月1日創立，總部位於香港。

info.description: PharmaCyte Biotech, Inc. is a clinical stage biotechnology company, which engages in the development and commercialization of treatments for cancer and diabetes. It focuses on a proprietary cellulose-based live cell encapsulation technology called Cell-in-a-Box, which will be used as a platform for the development of treatments for inoperable pancreatic cancer and other solid cancerous tumors, and diabetes. The company was founded on October 28, 1996 and is headquartered in Las Vegas, NV.
info.description_zh: PharmaCyte Biotech, Inc.是一家臨床階段生物技術公司，從事癌症和糖尿病治療的開發和商業化。它專注於一種名為 Cell-in-a-Box 的基於纖維素的專有活細胞封裝技術，該技術將用作開發無法手術的胰腺癌和其他實體癌腫瘤以及糖尿病治療方法的平台。該公司成立於1996年10月28日，總部位於內華達州拉斯維加斯。

info.description: Super League Enterprise, Inc. creates innovative and immersive entertainment experiences, platform and audience monetization and dynamic content feeding channels across the world's top gaming platforms. Fueled by an insatiable desire to stay on the forefront of this ever-evolving meta landscape, Super League pioneer's proprietary digital solutions provide unparalleled access to the global gaming audience. It also creates vibrant in-game communities through the development of innovative experiences and custom content, delivering powerful opportunities for brands and advertisers to achieve impactful insights, and marketing outcomes with audiences of all ages. The company was founded by John C. Miller, David Steigelfest, and Brett Morris on October 1, 2014 and is headquartered in Santa Monica, CA.
info.description_zh: Super League Enterprise, Inc. 在全球頂級遊戲平台上創造創新和沈浸式娛樂體驗、平台和受眾貨幣化以及動態內容供給管道。在不斷發展的元景觀中保持領先地位的永不滿足的願望的推動下，超級聯賽先鋒的專有數位解決方案為全球遊戲觀眾提供了無與倫比的訪問機會。它還透過開發創新體驗和客製化內容來創建充滿活力的遊戲內社區，為品牌和廣告商提供強大的機會，以獲得有影響力的見解，並為所有年齡段的受眾帶來行銷成果。該公司由 John C. Miller、David Steigelfest 和 Brett Morris 於 2014 年 10 月 1 日創立，總部位於加州聖莫尼卡。

info.description: PDS Biotechnology Corp. engages in the development of clinical-stage immunotherapies to treat various early-stage and late-stage cancers, including head and neck cancer, prostate cancer, breast cancer, cervical cancer, anal cancer, and other cancers. Its products include PDS0101 and PDS01ADC. The company was founded by Frank K. Bedu-Addo in 2005 and is headquartered in Princeton, NJ.
info.description_zh: PDS Biotechnology Corp.從事臨床階段免疫療法的開發，以治療各種早期和晚期癌症，包括頭頸癌、前列腺癌、乳腺癌、子宮頸癌、肛門癌和其他癌症。其產品包括PDS0101和PDS01ADC。該公司由 Frank K. Bedu-Addo 於 2005 年創立，總部位於新澤西州普林斯頓。

info.description: WF International Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of supply, installation, fitting-out, and maintenance services for heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems, floor heating systems, and water purification systems. The company was founded by Ke Chen in June 2009 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.
info.description_zh: WF International Ltd. 是一家控股公司，從事暖氣、通風和空調 (HVAC) 系統、地暖系統和水淨化系統的供應、安裝、裝修和維護服務。該公司由陳柯於2009年6月創立，總部位於中國成都。

info.description: New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. is an exploration and production company, which engages in selling oil and natural gas products. The company was founded on February 6, 2023 and is headquartered in Midland, TX.
info.description_zh: New Era Energy & Digital, Inc.是一家勘探和生產公司，從事石油和天然氣產品的銷售。該公司成立於2023年2月6日，總部位於德克薩斯州米德蘭。

info.description: Q/C Technologies, Inc. engages in the provision of energy-efficient blockchain and cryptocurrency infrastructure through quantum-class laser-based computing. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Q/C Technologies, Inc. 致力於透過基於量子級雷射的計算提供節能區塊鏈和加密貨幣基礎設施。該公司成立於1989年，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Murano Global Investments Plc operates as a real estate company. The firm owns, develops and invests in hotel, resort and commercial properties. It focuses on capturing value at all stages of the real estate cycle. The company is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: Murano Global Investments Plc 是一家房地產公司。該公司擁有、開發和投資酒店、度假村和商業房地產。它專注於捕捉房地產週期各個階段的價值。該公司總部位於英國倫敦。

info.description: SUNation Energy, Inc. is focused on local and regional solar, storage, and energy services companies nationwide. The firm's vision is to power the energy transition through the grass-roots growth of solar electricity paired with battery storage. Its portfolio of brands, including SUNation, Hawaii Energy Connection, E-Gear, Sungevity, and Horizon Solar Power, provides homeowners and small businesses with an end-to-end product offering spanning solar, battery storage, and grid services. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Ronkonkoma, NY.
info.description_zh: SUNation Energy, Inc. 專注於全國各地的本地和區域太陽能、儲存和能源服務公司。該公司的願景是透過太陽能發電與電池儲存相結合的基層成長來推動能源轉型。其品牌組合包括 SUNation、Hawaii Energy Connection、E-Gear、Sungevity 和 Horizo​​n Solar Power，為房主和小型企業提供涵蓋太陽能、電池儲存和電網服務的端到端產品。該公司成立於 1969 年，總部位於紐約州朗康科馬。

info.description: Wellgistics Health, Inc. operates as a holding company centered around pharmaceuticals and healthcare services. Its business portfolio consists of a pharmacy, wholesale operations, and a technology division with a novel platform for hub and clinical services. The company was founded by Ajjarapu Surendra on September 6, 2022 and is headquartered in Tampa, FL.
info.description_zh: Wellgistics Health, Inc. 以製藥和醫療保健服務為中心的控股公司營運。其業務組合包括藥房、批發業務和擁有新穎的中心和臨床服務平台的技術部門。該公司由 Ajjarapu Surendra 於 2022 年 9 月 6 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州坦帕。

info.description: Mobix Labs, Inc. operates as a semiconductor company. It develops wireless and connected solutions that are designed to cater to a broad range of applications in markets including 5G infrastructure, satellite communications, automotive, consumer electronics, e-mobility, healthcare, infrastructure and defense. The company was founded on July 31, 2020 and is headquartered in Irvine, CA.
info.description_zh: Mobix Labs, Inc. 以半導體公司營運。該公司開發無線和連網解決方案，旨在滿足 5G 基礎設施、衛星通訊、汽車、消費性電子、電動車、醫療保健、基礎設施和國防等市場的廣泛應用。該公司成立於2020年7月31日，總部位於加州歐文。

info.description: SU Group Holdings Ltd. engages in the provision of security-related engineering services, and security guarding and screening services. It operates through the Security-Related Engineering Services and Security Guarding and Screening Services segments. The company was founded by Ming Chan in 1998 and is headquartered in Hong Kong.
info.description_zh: SU Group Holdings Ltd.從事提供安全相關工程服務及保全及安檢服務。它透過安全相關工程服務以及安全防護和安檢服務部門運作。該公司由Ming Chan於1998年創立，總部位於香港。

info.description: IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. provides public market investors with broad exposure to the programmable intellectual property economy in a regulated equity format. Its treasury reserve of digital tokens enables direct participation in the Story ecosystem, which supports on-chain registration, licensing, and monetization of intellectual property. The company was founded by Justin B. Stiefel and Jennifer D. H. Stiefel on July 19, 2011 and is headquartered in Gig Harbor, WA.
info.description_zh: IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. 以受監管的股權形式為公開市場投資者提供廣泛的可編程智慧財產權經濟投資機會。其數位代幣的財務儲備可以直接參與 Story 生態系統，支援智慧財產權的鏈上註冊、授權和貨幣化。該公司由 Justin B. Stiefel 和 Jennifer D. H. Stiefel 於 2011 年 7 月 19 日創立，總部位於華盛頓州吉格港。

info.description: Smart Powerr Corp. engages in the provision of energy savings and recycling products and services. It offers waste energy recycling projects for industrial applications and develops a Build-Operate-Transfer model to provide energy saving and recovery facilities for multiple energy intensive industries in China. The company was founded by Guo Hua Ku on May 8, 1980 and is headquartered in Xi'an, China.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 再生能源
info.description_zh: Smart Powerr Corp. 從事提供節能和回收產品及服務。該公司提供工業應用廢能回收項目，並開發建造-營運-轉移模式，為中國多個能源密集型產業提供節能和回收設施。該公司由郭華庫於1980年5月8日創立，總部位於中國西安。

info.description: AIFU, Inc. engages in the provision of agency services and insurance claims adjusting services. It operates through the Insurance Agency and Claims Adjusting segments. The Insurance Agency segment includes providing agency services for insurance products and life insurance products. The Claims Adjusting segment provides pre-underwriting survey services, claims adjusting services, disposal of residual value services, loading and unloading supervision services, and consulting services. The company was founded by Yin An Hu and Qiu Ping Lai in 1998 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
info.description_zh: AIFU, Inc. 從事提供代理服務和保險理賠服務。它透過保險代理和理賠部門運作。保險代理部門包括提供保險產品和人壽保險產品的代理服務。理賠分部提供承保前勘察服務、理賠服務、殘值處置服務、裝卸監督服務、諮詢服務。該公司由胡銀安和賴秋萍於1998年創立，總部位於中國廣州。

info.description: SailPoint, Inc. engages in the provision of a comprehensive identity security platform for the enterprise. Its solutions enable organizations to establish, control, and automate policies that help them define and maintain a robust security posture and achieve regulatory compliance. The company was founded by Mark David McClain in 2005 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: SailPoint, Inc. 致力於為企業提供全面的身份安全平台。其解決方案使組織能夠建立、控制和自動化策略，幫助他們定義和維護強大的安全態勢並實現法規遵循。該公司由 Mark David McClain 於 2005 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: The Glimpse Group, Inc. operates as technology development company, which engages in the provision of virtual and augmented reality, and spatial computing software and services. The company was founded by Lyron L. Bentovim, Maydan Rothblum, and David J. Smith on June 15, 2016 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Glimpse Group, Inc. 是一家技術開發公司，從事提供虛擬和擴增實境以及空間運算軟體和服務。該公司由 Lyron L. Bentovim、Maydan Rothblum 和 David J. Smith 於 2016 年 6 月 15 日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: AngioDynamics, Inc. is a medical device company, which engages in the development, manufacturing, and sale of medical devices for vascular access, surgery, peripheral vascular disease, and oncology. The firm offers ablation systems, fluid management systems, vascular access, angiographic, drainage, thrombolytic, and venous products. It operates through the Med Tech and Med Device segments. The Med Tech segment consists of technology portfolio including Auryon, the thrombus management platform and NanoKnife. The Med Device segment focuses on core, venous, ports, and other oncology products. The company was founded by Howard S. Stern and Eamonn P. Hobbs on February 9, 1988 and is headquartered in Latham, NY.
info.description_zh: AngioDynamics, Inc.是一家醫療器材公司，從事血管通路、外科、週邊血管疾病和腫瘤領域醫療器材的開發、製造和銷售。該公司提供消融系統、液體管理系統、血管通路、血管攝影、引流、血栓溶解和靜脈產品。它透過醫療技術和醫療設備部門運作。醫療技術部門由 Auryon、血栓管理平台和 NanoKnife 等技術組合組成。醫療設備部門專注於核心、靜脈、端口和其他腫瘤產品。該公司由 Howard S. Stern 和 Eamonn P. Hobbs 於 1988 年 2 月 9 日創立，總部位於紐約州萊瑟姆。

info.description: Horizon Kinetics Texas ETF is an actively managed equity fund focused on long-term capital appreciation. The fund invests primarily in stocks of companies operating in the oil, gas & consumable fuels industry and the energy equipment & services sectors, across a diversified range of market capitalizations. The investment strategy combines fundamental, value-oriented research with selective growth opportunities to identify companies expected to benefit directly or indirectly from expanding economic opportunities within the State of Texas. The fund targets businesses positioned to capitalize on Texas-specific advantages, including energy sector strength, favorable regulatory conditions, and sustained demographic and economic growth.
info.description_zh: Horizo​​n Kinetics Texas ETF 是一檔專注於長期資本增值的主動管理股票基金。該基金主要投資於石油、天然氣和消耗性燃料產業以及能源設備和服務業的公司股票，其市值範圍多元化。該投資策略將基礎性、價值導向的研究與選擇性成長機會相結合，以確定預計將直接或間接受益於德州不斷擴大的經濟機會的公司。該基金的目標是那些能夠利用德州特有優勢的企業，包括能源產業的實力、有利的監管條件以及持續的人口和經濟成長。

info.description: WEBs Consumer Discretionary XLY Defined Volatility ETF seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond to the performance of the Syntax Defined Volatility XLY Index (the "Index"). The fund implements its investment objective by investing, under normal market conditions, at least 80% of its net assets (including borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments that achieve the investment results of the index. The index is a rules-based strategy that seeks to track the net asset value of a portfolio of securities of companies in the consumer discretionary sector of the large-cap U.S. equity market. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: WEBs 非必需消費品 XLY 定義波動率 ETF 力求提供扣除費用和開支先前與 Syntax 定義波動率 XLY 指數（「指數」）表現相對應的投資結果。該基金透過在正常市場條件下將至少80%的淨資產（包括用於投資目的的借款）投資於實現指數投資結果的金融工具來實現其投資目標。該指數是一種基於規則的策略，旨在追蹤美國大盤股市場非必需消費品產業公司證券投資組合的資產淨值。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: MDB Capital Holdings LLC is an investment holding company, which engages the provision of a foundational platform specializing in financing startups, partnering with co-founders, and fostering significant value creation. It operates through the following segments: Broker Dealer and Intellectual Property Service, Technology Development, and Other. The Broker Dealer and Intellectual Property Service segment includes Public Ventures and PatentVest. The Technology Development segment is involved in Invizyne. The Other segment focuses on non-income generating subsidiaries for management of the business including MDB CG Management Company, Inc. The company was founded by Christopher Anthony Marlett in 1997 and is headquartered in Addison, TX.
info.description_zh: MDB Capital Holdings LLC 是一家投資控股公司，致力於提供專門為新創公司融資、與聯合創始人合作以及促進重大價值創造的基礎平台。它透過以下部門運作：經紀交易商和智慧財產權服務、技術開發和其他。經紀交易商和智慧財產權服務部門包括 Public Ventures 和 PatentVest。 Invizyne 涉及技術開發部門。其他部門則專注於管理業務的非創收子公司，包括 MDB CG Management Company, Inc.。該公司由 Christopher Anthony Marlett 於 1997 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州艾迪生。

info.description: Huize Holding Ltd. engages in the provision of insurance brokerage services through its online platform. It distributes insurance products underwritten by insurer partners and helps them to reach a large number of insurance clients. The company was founded by Cun Jun Ma in August 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
info.description_zh: 匯澤控股有限公司透過其線上平台提供保險經紀服務。它分銷由保險公司合作夥伴承保的保險產品，並幫助他們接觸大量的保險客戶。該公司由馬存軍於2006年8月創立，總部位於中國深圳。

info.description: Tema International Defense Innovation ETF seeks to provide long-term growth. Under normal circumstances, the Tema International Defense Innovation ETF seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing at least 80% of its net assets, which include borrowings for investment purposes, in domestic and foreign, common and preferred stocks of publicly listed companies within the Aerospace and Defense sector, as defined by Global Industry Classification Sector. The Fund will invest in companies that generate 50% of revenue from the development, manufacture, operation, support and distribution of the following sub-sectors that support civilian and military defense, and where the Adviser believes the company spends a significant portion of its research budget in innovation: 1. Defense Equipment 2. Defense Technology and 3.Cyber Defense. The Fund's portfolio generally is expected to consist of more than 15 companies but not more than 100 companies. The number of portfolio companies may change depending on the number of companies available for investment that meet the Fund's criteria. The Fund invests in companies generally with a market capitalization of at least $100 million and there is no upper limit on the market capitalization of a portfolio company.
info.description_zh: Tema 國際國防創新 ETF 致力於提供長期成長。在正常情況下，特馬國際國防創新ETF尋求透過將至少80%的淨資產（包括用於投資目的的借款）投資於全球產業分類部門定義的航空航太和國防領域內的國內外上市公司的普通股和優先股來實現其投資目標。該基金將投資於50%收入來自以下支持民用和軍事防禦的子行業的開發、製造、運營、支持和分銷的公司，並且顧問認為該公司將其研究預算的很大一部分用於創新：1.國防設備2.國防技術和3.網絡防禦。該基金的投資組合通常預計由超過 15 家公司組成，但不超過 100 家公司。投資組合公司的數量可能會根據符合基金標準的可供投資的公司數量而變化。該基金一般投資於市值至少1億美元的公司，投資組合公司的市值沒有上限。

info.description: Vendome Acquisition Corp. I operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on January 28, 2025 and is headquartered in Park City, UT.
info.description_zh: Vendome Acquisition Corp. I 是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年1月28日，總部位於猶他州帕克城。

info.description: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corp. engages in providing information technology, consulting, and business process outsourcing services. Its services include application services, artificial intelligence, business process services, cloud solutions, and core modernization. It operates through the following segments: Healthcare Sciences (HS), Financial Services (FS), Products and Resources (P and R), and Communications, Media, and Technology (CMT). The HS segment is involved in healthcare and life sciences. The FS segment focuses on banking and insurance services. The P and R segment includes retail and consumer goods. The CMT segment relates to communications, information, media and entertainment, and technology. The company was founded by Wijeyaraj Kumar Mahadeva and Francisco D'Souza on April 6, 1988 and is headquartered in Teaneck, NJ.
info.description_zh: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corp. 從事提供資訊科技、諮詢和業務流程外包服務。其服務包括應用服務、人工智慧、業務流程服務、雲端解決方案和核心現代化。它透過以下部門運作：醫療保健科學 (HS)、金融服務 (FS)、產品和資源 (P 和 R) 以及通訊、媒體和技術 (CMT)。 HS 部門涉足醫療保健和生命科學領域。金融服務部門專注於銀行和保險服務。 P and R 部門包括零售和消費品。 CMT 部門涉及通訊、資訊、媒體和娛樂以及科技。該公司由 Wijeyaraj Kumar Mahadeva 和 Francisco D'Souza 於 1988 年 4 月 6 日創立，總部位於新澤西州蒂內克。

info.description: Ralph Lauren Corp. engages in the design, marketing, and distribution of luxury lifestyle products, including apparel, footwear and accessories, home, fragrances, and hospitality categories. The firm offers products under the brands of Ralph Lauren, Ralph Lauren Luxury, Lauren Ralph Lauren, Polo Ralph Lauren, Lauren Ralph Lauren, Chaps and Hospitality. It operates through the following segments: North America, Europe, and Asia. The North America segment offers Ralph Lauren branded apparel, accessories, home furnishings, and related products made through the retail and wholesale businesses in the U.S. and Canada. The Europe segment includes Ralph Lauren branded products made through the retail and wholesale businesses in Europe and emerging markets. The Asia segment consists of Ralph Lauren branded products made through the retail and wholesale businesses in Asia, Australia, and New Zealand. The company was founded by Ralph Lauren in 1967 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Ralph Lauren Corp. 從事奢華生活風格產品的設計、行銷和分銷，包括服裝、鞋類和配件、家居、香水和酒店類別。該公司提供 Ralph Lauren、Ralph Lauren Luxury、Lauren Ralph Lauren、Polo Ralph Lauren、Lauren Ralph Lauren、Chaps and Hospitality 等品牌的產品。它透過以下部門運作：北美、歐洲和亞洲。北美部門提供透過美國和加拿大的零售和批發業務生產的 Ralph Lauren 品牌服裝、配件、家居用品和相關產品。歐洲部門包括透過歐洲和新興市場的零售和批發業務生產的 Ralph Lauren 品牌產品。亞洲部門包括透過亞洲、澳洲和紐西蘭的零售和批發業務生產的 Ralph Lauren 品牌產品。該公司由 Ralph Lauren 於 1967 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Allied Gaming & Entertainment, Inc. operates as an experiential entertainment company, which engages in the creation of esports venues and live events for both video games and poker. It operates through following segments: E-Sports, Casual Mobile Gaming and Live Concert Promotion and Events Organizing. The E-Sports segment, provided through Allied Esports, includes video game events and tournaments. The Casual Mobile Gaming segment is provided through Z-Tech. The Live Concert Promotion and Events Organizing segment is provided through Skyline. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Allied Gaming & Entertainment, Inc. 是一家體驗式娛樂公司，致力於為視訊遊戲和撲克創建電子場場地和現場活動。它透過以下部門運作：電子競技、休閒行動遊戲以及現場音樂會推廣和活動組織。電子競技部分由 Allied Esports 提供，包括電玩賽事和錦標賽。休閒行動遊戲部分由 Z-Tech 提供。現場音樂會推廣和活動組織部分透過 Skyline 提供。該公司成立於2017年，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Autonomix Medical, Inc. is a development stage medical device development company focused on advancing innovative technologies for sensing and treating disorders relating to the nervous system. Its technology platform includes a catheter-based microchip-enabled array that can detect and differentiate neural signals with a high degree of sensitivity as demonstrated in animal studies. The company was founded by Robert Schwartz, Landy Toth, David A. Robins, and Robert A. Van Tassel on June 10, 2014 and is headquartered in The Woodlands, TX.
info.description_zh: Autonomix Medical, Inc. 是一家處於開發階段的醫療設備開發公司，專注於推動感測和治療神經系統相關疾病的創新技術。其技術平台包括基於導管的微晶片陣列，如動物研究所示，該陣列可以高度靈敏地檢測和區分神經訊號。該公司由 Robert Schwartz、Landy Toth、David A. Robins 和 Robert A. Van Tassel 於 2014 年 6 月 10 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州伍德蘭茲。

info.description: Apex Treasury Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which refer to throughout this prospectus as initial business combination. The company was founded on June 26, 2025 and is headquartered in Vero Beach, FL.
info.description_zh: Apex Treasury Corp. 以空白支票公司經營。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併，在本招股說明書中稱為初始業務合併。該公司成立於 2025 年 6 月 26 日，總部位於佛羅裡達州維羅海灘。

info.description: Crocs, Inc. engages in the design, development, manufacture, worldwide marketing, sale, and distribution of lifestyle footwear and accessories. It operates through the Crocs Brand and HEYDUDE Brand segments. The Crocs Brand segment refers to the United States, South Korea, China, Japan, Singapore, Canada, Germany, Great Britain, France, Malaysia, Australia, Puerto Rico, the Netherlands, Australia, India, and Ireland. The HEYDUDE Brand segment focuses on the United States. The company was founded by Scott Seamans, George B. Boedecker, Jr., and Lyndon V. Hanson III in 2002 and is headquartered in Broomfield, CO.
info.description_zh: Crocs, Inc. 從事時尚鞋類和配件的設計、開發、製造、全球行銷、銷售和分銷。它透過 Crocs 品牌和 HEYDUDE 品牌部門運作。 Crocs 品牌細分市場涉及美國、韓國、中國、日本、新加坡、加拿大、德國、英國、法國、馬來西亞、澳洲、波多黎各、荷蘭、澳洲、印度和愛爾蘭。 HEYDUDE 品牌細分市場專注於美國。該公司由 Scott Seamans、George B. Boedecker, Jr. 和 Lyndon V. Hanson III 於 2002 年創立，總部位於科羅拉多州布魯姆菲爾德。

info.description: Tema Cardiovascular and Metabolic ETF seeks to provide long-term growth of capital. Under normal circumstances, the fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing at least 80% of its net assets, which include borrowings for investment purposes, in publicly listed companies that derive at least 50% of revenues from products or services related to the treatment of cardiovascular diseases and/or metabolic diseases, as defined by the Centers for Diseases Control and Preventions. The fund advisor generally is expected to consist of more than 15 companies but not more than 100 companies. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Tema 心血管和代謝 ETF 尋求提供長期資本成長。在正常情況下，該基金尋求透過將至少 80% 的淨資產（包括用於投資目的的借款）投資於至少 50% 收入來自與疾病控制和預防中心定義的心血管疾病和/或代謝疾病治療相關的產品或服務的上市公司來實現其投資目標。基金顧問一般預計由超過15家公司組成，但不超過100家公司。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: iBio, Inc. is an AI-driven innovator that develops next-generation biopharmaceuticals using computational biology and 3D-modeling of subdominant and conformational epitopes, prospectively enabling the discovery of new antibody treatments for hard to target cancers, and other diseases. It focuses on decreasing drug failures, shortening drug development timelines and opening up new frontiers against the most promising targets. The company was founded on April 17, 2008 and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.
info.description_zh: iBio, Inc. 是一家由人工智慧驅動的創新公司，利用計算生物學以及次優勢和構象表位的 3D 建模來開發下一代生物製藥，從而有望發現針對難以靶向的癌症和其他疾病的新抗體療法。它的重點是減少藥物失敗、縮短藥物開發時間並針對最有希望的目標開闢新領域。該公司成立於2008年4月17日，總部位於加州聖地牙哥。

info.description: State Street My2029 High Yield Corporate Bond ETF is an actively managed fund that employs a target maturity strategy, primarily investing in high-yield corporate bonds scheduled to mature in 2029. The fund utilizes a bottom-up security selection process to overweight attractive sectors and issuers while seeking to maximize current income and preserve capital as it approaches its planned liquidation date on or about December 15, 2029.
info.description_zh: State Street My2029 高收益公司債 ETF 是一檔積極管理的基金，採用目標到期日策略，主要投資於計劃於 2029 年到期的高收益公司債。該基金利用自下而上的證券選擇流程來增持有吸引力的行業和發行人，同時在接近 2029 年 12 月 15 日左右的計劃清算日期時尋求最大化當前收入並保留資本。

info.description: OnKure Therapeutics, Inc. engages in discovering and developing precision medicines that target biologically validated drivers of cancers underserved by available therapies. The company uses a structure and computational chemistry driven drug design platform, committed to improving clinical outcomes for patients by building a robust pipeline of small molecule drugs designed to selectively target specific mutations thought to be key drivers of cancer. It is headquartered in Boulder, CO.
info.description_zh: OnKure Therapeutics, Inc. 致力於發現和開發精準藥物，針對現有療法不足的、經過生物學驗證的癌症驅動因素。該公司使用結構和計算化學驅動的藥物設計平台，致力於透過建立強大的小分子藥物管道來改善患者的臨床結果，這些藥物旨在選擇性地針對被認為是癌症關鍵驅動因素的特定突變。其總部位於科羅拉多州博爾德。

info.description: RockCreek Global Equality ETF seeks to achieve long-term capital appreciation. Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest in equity securities of companies that have demonstrated a commitment to managing their organizations with a gender-balance approach (e.g., seeking gender balance across its management or employees). The fund will typically invest in common and preferred stocks, ADRs, and GDRs of companies located in a number of countries throughout the world, including issuers located in emerging markets. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: RockCreek Global Equality ETF 尋求長期資本增值。在正常情況下，該基金將投資於那些承諾以性別平衡方式管理其組織的公司的股本證券（例如，尋求管理層或員工之間的性別平衡）。本基金通常投資於全球多個國家（包括新興市場的發行人）公司的普通股和優先股、美國存託憑證（ADR）和全球存託憑證（GDR）。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Republic Digital Acquisition Co. is a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on January 23, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Republic Digital Acquisition Co. 是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年1月23日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Intelligent Real Estate ETF seeks total return. The fund is an actively-managed exchange-traded fund ("ETF") that will invest in a diversified portfolio of publicly-traded real estate investment trusts ("REITs") and mortgage-backed securities ("MBS") listed primarily on U.S. stock exchanges, and to a lesser extent, stock exchanges in Canada, Europe, and Asia. The fund will invest in REITs and MBS that, in the determination of the fund's sub-adviser, have similar qualitative characteristics to the aggregate real estate portfolio holdings of a select group of public, non-traded REITs. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 智慧房地產ETF追求總回報。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金（「ETF」），將投資於主要在美國證券交易所上市的公開交易房地產投資信託基金（「REIT」）和抵押貸款支持證券（「MBS」）的多元化投資組合，其次是在加拿大、歐洲和亞洲的證券交易所上市。該基金將投資於基金副顧問確定的房地產投資信託基金和抵押貸款支持證券，這些房地產投資信託基金和抵押貸款支持證券與選定的一組公共非交易房地產投資信託基金的總房地產投資組合持有量具有相似的品質特徵。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: SC II Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on June 30, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: SC II Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運作。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年6月30日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Sanofi engages in the research, production, and distribution of pharmaceutical products. It operates through the Biopharma segment, which comprises commercial operations and research, development and production activities relating to the specialty care, general medicines and vaccines franchises plus support and corporate functions, for all geographical territories. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
info.description_zh: 賽諾菲從事醫藥產品的研究、生產和分銷。該公司透過生物製藥部門運營，該部門包括與所有地理區域的專業護理、普通藥物和疫苗特許經營權以及支持和公司職能相關的商業運營以及研究、開發和生產活動。該公司成立於1973年，總部位於法國巴黎。

info.description: Sizzle Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company which was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on July 8, 2024 and is headquartered in Washington, DC.
info.description_zh: Sizzle Acquisition Corp. II 是一家空白支票公司，其成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2024年7月8日，總部位於華盛頓特區。

info.description: Translational Development Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company that was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on April 19, 2022 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Translational Development Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2022年4月19日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Millicom International Cellular SA engages in the cable and mobile services. It operates through the Latin America and Africa geographical segments. The Latin America segment includes the Guatemala and Honduras joint ventures. The Africa segment comprises of the operations in Tanzania. The company was founded on December 14, 1990 and is headquartered in Luxembourg.
info.description_zh: Millicom International Cellular SA 從事有線和行動服務。它透過拉丁美洲和非洲地理區域開展業務。拉丁美洲部門包括危地馬拉和宏都拉斯合資企業。非洲部門包括坦尚尼亞的業務。該公司成立於1990年12月14日，總部位於盧森堡。

info.description: VictoryShares Corporate Bond ETF seeks maximum current income without undue risk to principal. Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in corporate bonds, and in related derivatives and other instruments that have economic characteristics similar to corporate bonds. The fund will invest primarily in investment-grade securities, but may invest up to 10% of its net assets in below-investment-grade corporate credit securities, which are sometimes referred to as high-yield or "junk" bonds.
info.description_zh: VictoryShares 公司債 ETF 尋求最大當前收入，而不會對本金帶來不當風險。一般情況下，基金至少80%的淨資產投資於公司債，以及相關衍生性商品和其他具有與公司債類似經濟特徵的工具。該基金將主要投資於投資等級證券，但最多可將其淨資產的 10% 投資於低於投資等級的企業信貸證券，這些證券有時被稱為高收益或「垃圾」債券。

info.description: Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on August 5, 2025 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I 是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年8月5日，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: Evolution Global Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination. The company was founded on June 26, 2025 and is headquartered in Farmers Branch, TX.
info.description_zh: Evolution Global Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，從事合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併的目的。該公司成立於2025年6月26日，總部位於德克薩斯州法默斯布蘭奇。

info.description: WEBs Defined Volatility XLE ETF seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond to the performance of the Syntax Defined Volatility XLE Index (the "Index"). The fund implements its investment objective by investing, under normal market conditions, at least 80% of its net assets in financial instruments that achieve the investment results of the index. The index is a rules-based strategy that seeks to track the net asset value of a portfolio of securities of companies in the energy sector of the large-cap U.S. equity market. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: WEBs Defined Volatility XLE ETF 力求提供扣除費用和開支先前與 Syntax Defined Volatility XLE 指數（「指數」）表現相對應的投資結果。該基金透過在正常市場條件下將至少80%的淨資產投資於實現指數投資結果的金融工具來實現其投資目標。該指數是一種基於規則的策略，旨在追蹤美國大型股票市場能源產業公司證券投資組合的資產淨值。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: BondBloxx Private Credit CLO ETF seeks capital preservation and current income. The fund invests, under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets (plus the amount of any borrowings for investment purposes) in private credit collateralized loan obligations ("CLOs"). A CLO is a type of asset backed security supported by interest and principal payments generated from a pool of loans, which may include, among others, U.S. and non-U.S. senior secured loans and subordinated corporate loans and privately placed loans. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: BondBloxx Private Credit CLO ETF 尋求資本保值和當前收入。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款金額）投資於私人信貸抵押貸款債券（「CLO」）。 CLO 是一種資產支持證券，由貸款池產生的利息和本金支付支持，其中可能包括美國和非美國優先擔保貸款、次級公司貸款和私募貸款。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: ConocoPhillips is an exploration and production company, which engages in the exploration, production, transport, and marketing of crude oil, bitumen, and natural gas. It operates through the following geographical segments: Alaska, Lower 48, Canada, Europe, Middle East, and North Africa, Asia Pacific, and Other International. The Alaska segment explores for, produces, transports and markets crude oil, natural gas and NGLs. The Lower 48 segment consists of operations located in the 48 contiguous U.S. states and the Gulf of Mexico. The Canada segment refers to oil sands development in the Athabasca Region of northeastern Alberta and a liquids-rich unconventional play in western Canada. The Europe, Middle East, and North Africa segment includes operations in the Norwegian sector of the North Sea, the Norwegian Sea, Qatar, Libya, Equatorial Guinea and commercial and terminalling operations in the U.K. The Asia Pacific segment focuses on explorations and product operations in China, Indonesia, Malaysia, and Australia. The Other International segment handles exploration activities in Columbia and Argentina. The company was founded by Isaac Elder Blake on November 25, 1875 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: 康菲石油公司是一家勘探和生產公司，從事原油、瀝青和天然氣的勘探、生產、運輸和行銷。該公司透過以下地理區域開展業務：阿拉斯加、下 48 州、加拿大、歐洲、中東和北非、亞太地區和其他國際地區。阿拉斯加部門勘探、生產、運輸和銷售原油、天然氣和液化天然氣。 Lower 48 部門包括位於美國 48 個鄰近州和墨西哥灣的業務。加拿大部分是指阿爾伯塔省東北部阿薩巴斯卡地區的油砂開發以及加拿大西部液體豐富的非常規油氣田。歐洲、中東和北非部門包括北海挪威部分、挪威海、卡達、利比亞、赤道幾內亞的業務以及英國的商業和碼頭業務。亞太部門專注於中國、印尼、馬來西亞和澳洲的勘探和產品營運。其他國際部門負責哥倫比亞和阿根廷的勘探活動。該公司由 Isaac Elder Blake 於 1875 年 11 月 25 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long AVGO Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of AVGO. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of AVGO, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 AVGO 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為 AVGO 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款）投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 AVGO 價格的 200% 每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。
